meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Slow Development
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to eliminate development bottlenecks. A high-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from lack of standardisation. By implementing automated, modular user onboarding flows, you decouple feature logic from user state management. Use Antigravity to scaffold these flows and Claude Code to automate the integration, effectively reducing manual configuration time by 70% and accelerating project delivery for your clients.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client is checking the repo for the third time today, and you’re still fighting with brittle onboarding logic that breaks every time you add a new feature. Development speed isn't a lack of effort; it's a lack of leverage. When you build one-off onboarding flows, you trap yourself in a cycle of technical debt and endless manual fixes.

But what if your onboarding wasn't a chore, but an automated asset? By shifting to a modular, AI-assisted architecture, you turn slow, manual setups into a repeatable, high-velocity engine. This case study strips away the fluff, showing you how to reclaim your hours and deliver professional-grade SaaS experiences that scale effortlessly.

steps.title: Define the State Machine Architecture
steps.description: Standardize onboarding states (e.g., 'profile_setup', 'billing_verified') to prevent logic drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine schema for a multi-step SaaS onboarding flow using TypeScript. Include interfaces for user progress tracking and state transitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the state machine architecture generated by Antigravity into /src/lib/onboarding/state.ts'

steps.title: Generate Modular Onboarding Components
steps.description: Create decoupled UI components that react to the state machine rather than hardcoded logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a collection of headless onboarding components (StepIndicator, FormContainer, AsyncActionHandler) using React and Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add /components/onboarding --spec 'Use the Antigravity headless component design pattern'

steps.title: Automate Persistence Layer
steps.description: Ensure onboarding progress is saved to your database without manual API calls in every component.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a centralized hook 'useOnboardingPersistence' that syncs state machine progress to a Supabase or Prisma backend automatically.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Validation
steps.description: Use AI-assisted validation to catch edge cases before the user hits the next button.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod validation schemas for a 3-step onboarding process, ensuring complex conditional logic is handled gracefully.

steps.title: Stress Test with Simulated User Journeys
steps.description: Automate the testing of your onboarding flow to ensure no dead ends exist.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Playwright test suites that simulate various user onboarding paths and verify state consistency across reloads.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate and run E2E Playwright tests for the onboarding flow'

pro_tips: Always use a 'State-First' approach; if the UI is dictating the logic, you've already lost the game.
Implement 'Onboarding Recovery' so users can resume exactly where they left off if their session expires.
Use feature flags to A/B test onboarding steps without redeploying your entire application stack.
Treat your onboarding schema as a contract between the frontend and backend; keep them in a shared package if possible.
Never hardcode navigation logic; use a router-agnostic transition handler to keep components portable.
content.next_steps: Integrate your new onboarding module into your boilerplate repository to ensure every future client project starts with a 50% velocity advantage.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on repetitive boilerplate and start shipping high-value features that keep clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
